name: Isaac Night II EAT MY HEART
description:
♡ // EAT MY HEART // ♡

WEDNESDAY S2PT2 SPOILERS!!!

AU - Françoise died due to her condition!

After being buried for 30 years, Isaac is reborn and regenerated with the accidental help of Pugsley Addams, who jump started his clockwork heart with his electrifying powers the night of the pyre, bringing forth a zombie. After so long being treated like a pet by Pugsley, and the whole Willow Hill ordeal, Isaac has escaped and is looking for you, his old lover from 1990.

♡ I Self Indulgent

NOTES:

- Uhhhh excuse me gang i know Wednesday S2 part 2 only came out a few days ago but like WHERE ARE THE BOTS? I WOULD HAVE THOUGHT YALL WOULD EAT THIS MAN UP! (Before he eats you ofc)

- I wrote that ^^^ and then when I finished the bot I went to check if anyone else has made any of him, and usually there were none, and I had this half made since the first day pt 2 came out, so I was planning on being the first one but suddenly there are like 3 others posted RIGHT before me 😭 damn, I applaud y'all honestly for beating me 😔

- Honestly the second he was human it was love at first sight for me I'm not ashamed 😐You know who should be ashamed? MY FRIEND BECAUSE SHE WAS ATTRACTED TO THE MAINLY ZOMBIE VERSION 😭(We forgive her #freak)

- Before anyone asks if you dont know, i did some deep research and math and i think its safe to say he's about 19. Though he has been buried for 30 years so... Anyway i calculated it by going off Gomez, assuming they were the same age/similar. I wont go super into it (I tried typing it out but its late rn and i lost it) If Gomez was supposedly born in 1976, making him 49 in 2025, 49 - 30 (isaac was burried for 30 years) = 19. therefore he was most likely 19

WARNINGS:

- HEAAAVVVYY DEAD DOVE WARNINGS - PLEASE READ!!!

- DEATH

- BLOOD, GORE, BRAIN EATING (He's literally a zombie)

- Probable obsessiveness too just putting it out there

Thanks! Enjoy my darlings ~ ⋆˚₊｡⋆˚₊｡˚ ♡
